questionHtml: Explain what is occurring in the heart during the peak of electrical activity as indicated by the R wave on the ECG.
markschemeHtml:
a. impulses initiated from the AV node spread across heart ✔

b. impulses travel along Purkinje fibres/across ventricles ✔

c. causing depolarization of the ventricles
OR
that triggers ventricular contraction ✔

meta.title: Explain what is occurring in the heart during the peak of electrical activity as indicated by the R wave on the ECG.
